title: Goldfish Growth Factors
description: What factors influence the growth rate of goldfish?
narrative: A user wants to understand the various factors that affect how fast goldfish grow, including genetics, diet, and environment. Relevant documents should provide information on these factors and how they impact goldfish growth rates. Documents that simply state a general growth rate or provide unrelated information on gardening or aquarium maintenance are not relevant.

title: Bluetooth vs Wi-Fi
description: What are the trade-offs between using Bluetooth and Wi-Fi for wireless connectivity, particularly with regards to speed, battery life, and audio quality?
narrative: The user is looking for information that compares and contrasts Bluetooth and Wi-Fi technologies in terms of their performance characteristics. Relevant documents should discuss the differences in speed, battery life, and audio quality between these two technologies, as well as any other relevant factors. The user is not interested in general information about wireless technology or how to enable/disable Bluetooth on a computer.

title: US Entry into WWI
description: What events led to the United States' decision to enter World War I?
